title: rubus × piletocarpus
intro: Rubus × piletocarpus, also known as the hybrid blackberry or black raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus fruticosus and Rubus idaeus species. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × piletocarpus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health due to its high content of fiber, vitamins, and minerals. Herbal preparations of Rubus × piletocarpus, such as tinctures, infusions, and jams, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide nutritional benefits.
